title: Vue Router Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of core components (router-link, router-view), basic configuration, and dynamic route matching.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the official router for Vue.js?
Which component should you use for internal navigation in Vue to avoid a full page reload?
Which and/or what is the component where the matched component for a given route will be rendered?
How do you define a dynamic route for a user profile in Vue Router (e.g. /user/john)?
Vue Router is a built-in library in the Vue core and doesn't require an external package installation.
